item.title: Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd Opens 5.3% Higher Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd (Stock ID: 557740) commenced trading on 1 April 2026 with a significant gap up, opening 5.3% higher than its previous close. This strong start underscores a positive market sentiment despite the stock’s recent downward trend and a recent downgrade by MarketsMOJO to a 'Sell' rating. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: DLF Ltd. Opens 4.51% Higher in Sharp Gap Up, But Can the Technicals Support It?
item.description: DLF Ltd. commenced trading on 1 April 2026 with a notable gap up, opening 4.51% higher than the previous close, signalling a robust start amid positive market sentiment in the realty sector. This upward move followed two consecutive days of decline, marking a short-term reversal in the stock’s recent performance. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 0.87 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline over the past three sessions has dragged MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 0.87, marking a significant 70% drop from its peak of Rs 2.90 within the last year. This steep fall comes amid a backdrop of deteriorating fundamentals and persistent negative quarterly results. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Gensol Engineering Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 18.61 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Gensol Engineering Ltd’s share price declined sharply to hit a new 52-week low of Rs.18.61 on 1 April 2026, marking a significant downturn for the micro-cap company within the Other Electrical Equipment sector. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices amid a series of financial and trading challenges. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Rapid Investments Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 59 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Rapid Investments Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 59 on 1 Apr 2026, marking a significant 58.4% drop from its peak of Rs 141.75 within the last year. This steep fall comes amid a backdrop of persistent underperformance and weak operating results, despite some positive signals in profitability metrics. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Glottis Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 37.05 Amidst Earnings and Institutional Pressure
item.description: After a turbulent period marked by declining sales and shrinking profits, Glottis Ltd has hit a fresh 52-week low of Rs 37.05 on 1 Apr 2026, reflecting sustained selling pressure despite a modest bounce in the last two sessions. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Jain Resource Recycling Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 499.95
item.description: With a decisive gap-up opening and a surge to an intraday high of Rs 499.95 on 01 Apr 2026, Jain Resource Recycling Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, marking a significant milestone in its price journey from Rs 247.80 a year ago. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of strong technical signals and sustained momentum across multiple timeframes. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Aditya Infotech Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1970
item.description: With a decisive gap-up opening of 9.59% on 1 Apr 2026, Aditya Infotech Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1970, marking a significant milestone in its price journey from a low of Rs 1014.65 over the past year. This rally stands out amid a broader market environment where the Sensex trades near its 52-week low, underscoring the stock's distinctive momentum. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Shree Tirupati Balajee Agro Trading Co. Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broad market rally that saw the Sensex gain 2.46% on 1 Apr 2026, Shree Tirupati Balajee Agro Trading Co. Ltd plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 21, marking a 47.35% decline over the past year and underscoring persistent headwinds for this micro-cap packaging company. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd’s stock price declined sharply to a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.34.5 on 1 April 2026, marking a significant downturn amid a challenging market environment and subdued company fundamentals. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Digidrive Distributors Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Digidrive Distributors Ltd’s stock price reached a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.15.61 on 1 April 2026, marking a significant decline amid ongoing financial pressures and subdued market sentiment within the e-retail sector. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But HMA Agro Industries Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly positive market environment, HMA Agro Industries Ltd plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 20 on 1 Apr 2026, marking a significant divergence from the rally seen in benchmark indices. This decline comes after a brief two-day recovery, underscoring persistent selling pressure on the micro-cap FMCG stock. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Global Surfaces Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 43.95 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Global Surfaces Ltd, a player in the diversified consumer products sector, has seen its share price decline to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.43.95 on 1 April 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market movements and company-specific challenges. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 126.55
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 126.55 on 1 Apr 2026, Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market with a 28.47% gain over the past five trading sessions. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push AGS Transact Technologies Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, AGS Transact Technologies Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 2.3 on 1 Apr 2026. This decline comes amid a broader market environment where the Sensex has been relatively resilient, highlighting the stock’s distinct downward trajectory. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: HP Adhesives Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 26.34 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has dragged HP Adhesives Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 26.34 on 1 Apr 2026, marking a significant 54.2% drop from its peak of Rs 57.5 within the last year. This downturn comes amid a backdrop of mixed financial signals and persistent underperformance relative to the broader market. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Acutaas Chemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2687.75
item.description: Surging to a new 52-week high of Rs 2,687.75 on 1 Apr 2026, Acutaas Chemicals Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, nearly tripling from its 52-week low of Rs 930.03. This milestone caps a year-long rally that has outpaced the Sensex by over 97 percentage points, underscoring the stock’s robust technical underpinnings amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 2.13 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the third consecutive session, Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd has seen its share price decline, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 2.13 on 1 Apr 2026. This marks a significant 67.5% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 6.55, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite a broader market that has shown mixed signals in recent days. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Anmol India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 8.45 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: After five consecutive sessions of decline, Anmol India Ltd finally breached its 52-week low, closing at Rs 8.45 on 1 Apr 2026. This marks a significant 56.8% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 19.55, underscoring the persistent downward pressure on the stock despite some recent signs of recovery. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Veer Global Infraconstruction Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Veer Global Infraconstruction Ltd’s share price declined sharply to hit a new 52-week low of Rs.71.81 on 1 April 2026, marking a significant downturn for the micro-cap realty stock amid broader market movements and sector dynamics. Time: 35 minutes ago
